content.en:
Ye Tian and the others followed the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor from the Ancient Spring Xuanlou, transferred again and again, and then came to a dark place where time and space were distorted.

"Closing all perceptions, without the cultivation of the half-step Ninefold Ancestor, I can't directly see or perceive everything here, even I can't protect you!"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor reminded.

Ye Tian and several other Dao Ancestors immediately closed their perceptions, not daring to try to probe everything here.

After closing his perception, Ye Tian even felt the slightest movement from the outside world, as if tempting him to let go of his perception.

"This place is terrifying!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If it weren't for the half-step Ninefold Ancestor staying, they wouldn't have come here at all.

After all, once the perception is closed, you can't identify the direction, you can only move indiscriminately, you can't go to the real destination at all, and it is very likely to go to the wrong place and die.

As time passed, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor took Ye Tian and them through this area.

"It's time to let go of your senses!"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor forcibly opened the body perception of several Dao Ancestors and notified them.

At this time, Ye Tiancai let go of his perception.

"This is the entrance to the secret place!"

Ye Tian looked at the void space in front of him, a layer of gray aura enveloped it, and the farther away even transmitted a terrifying aura.

Ye Tian didn't even dare to investigate, as if there was danger as soon as he investigated.

"This is the entrance to the secret land, don't explore outside of the secret place, or your will will collapse. Also, don't touch this gray aura, it's a special power from the primordial ancient sea, even the Yae Primordial Ancestor doesn't dare to touch it. Wait a minute, our Ninefold Ancestors of the Nine-Story Building will open a passage for you to enter. "

"Another reminder to you, this secret place was provided to us by the Boulder tribe, although they have mastered the entrance to this secret place, this secret place has been controlled by a powerful tribe of the Primordial Ancient Sea, and there are many primordial artifacts in it. So, when you enter this secret place, you will most likely have to fight against those primordial antiquities. According to our deduction, the most powerful primordial artifacts in this secret place are only half-step eightfold primordial ancestors, but some half-step eightfold primordial artifacts are not necessarily weaker than yours. "

As soon as the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said this, several Dao Ancestors were slightly solemn, not daring to be careless.

......

Bang!!!!

The gray aura was torn apart by the Nine Primordial Ancestors, forming a passage.

"Let's go inside!"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor shouted.

Whew!!

A half-step Eightfold Ancestor flew into this passage and entered the secret place.

Primordial Ancient Sea, Bloody Tribe.

This tribe occupies the secret land, and some primordial artifacts are stationed at the entrance at the other end of the secret land, and there are six avatar-level people sitting here.

At this time, these Avatar-level clansmen had already sensed the shock of the secret land.

"If a creature enters the secret place, it should be a cultivator, it seems that this secret place has been exposed!" said a transformation-level blood man.

"We can't enter, and neither can the Ninefold Origin Ancestor of the Silent Black Sea cultivators, they can only send a group of half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestors to enter. But almost none of our half-step Yae Origin Ancestors have any wisdom, and they can only give us some orders, even if they send too much, it is easy to suffer!"

"Let Killua enter, his strength is very strong, and he has completed the half-transformation, and has wisdom, if he is in the past, he can wisdom the people and kill those cultivators!" another transformation-level bloodman proposed.

At the mention of Killua, several other Bloodies agreed.

Killua is also a half-step eightfold ancestor level, it can enter this secret place, and it has wisdom, it is one of the research successes of their blood tribe, and it has also completed the half-transformed state.

It can be said that Killua will inevitably become a chemical-level powerhouse in the future.

Airplanes!!!

A blood-colored figure soon arrived here, and it was the Killua in the mouths of these transformation-level powerhouses.

"Killua has seen a few elders!"

Killua said respectfully.

"Killua, you bring a group of half-step Eightfold Ancestor level clansmen in, and if you encounter cultivators, kill them!"

A Morphose-level elder ordered.

"Yes!"

Killua replied.

......

In the secret place.

Ye Tian came in, and immediately separated from the other half-step eightfold ancestors.

There are not many primordial artifacts in the secret land, and although this place is controlled by the Bloody Tribe, the Bloody Tribe does not need to send too many Primordial Artifacts in.

The Bloodmen only need to protect a portion of the resources that are useful to them, so they don't need many primordial artifact guards.

In addition to the distant antiquities in the secret land, there are also some creatures born in the secret land itself.

The Primordial Antiquities are to prevent these creatures from destroying resources, and that's their mission.

But as the half-step eightfold ancestors of the major forces entered the secret land, the blood-man tribe let Killua lead a large number of half-step eightfold ancestors and sevenfold ancestor-level primordial artifacts in.

No, Ye Tian soon encountered a group of bloody people.

These bloody people are completely composed of special blood energy, similar in appearance to people, and have a very strong recovery ability, which is no less difficult to kill than the original ancients.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian casually blew up a piece of blood people, and those blood people who were comparable to the peak of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor were directly annihilated, while the blood people who were comparable to the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor level did not die, but quickly recovered.

"It's worthy of being a bloody person of the Blood Man Tribe, so hard to kill!"

Ye Tian began to get serious, and directly cast the Endless Golden Spear, instantly piercing through these half-step eightfold ancestor-level blood people.

This time I finally killed them in seconds!

However, nothing good was born in the blood man's body, and there was no benefit after killing it.

However, there are a lot of resources in the secret land, and this group of blood people is protecting a treasure land of resources.

After killing them all, Ye Tian began to collect the resources here.

"Hey, this is the White Crystal Emperor Flower!"

Ye Tian was shocked when he found such a good thing.

The White Crystal Emperor Flower is a good thing that can greatly improve the level of life, and it takes 1,000 trillion years of the original domain era from conception to maturity.

After maturity, there are only three petals, and each additional petal takes 5,000 trillion years of the original domain era.

And now, this White Crystal Emperor Flower has grown eight petals, which shows that this White Crystal Emperor Flower has been bred and grown here for tens of trillions of Origin Era years.

"The Blood Man Tribe should want to cultivate into a nine-petaled White Crystal Emperor Flower, once the White Crystal Emperor Flower grows into a nine-petal, it will even have an effect on Dao Ancestors whose life level exceeds 50 or more. "

However, Ye Tian didn't have time here to wait for it to grow into nine petals.

So, Ye Tian directly picked this white crystal emperor flower.

With this eight-petal White Crystal Emperor Flower, he even had the hope of directly raising his life level a lot.

"This secret place is really a place of great opportunity, I found the White Crystal Emperor Flower casually!" Ye Tian was quite excited.
